properties.property: -- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("level_nopk") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (playerchats) { -- if (strequals(#c,commands)) { -- say2("Commands: -- #bOpen 1-4 - Opens -- #bcorresponding number booth -- #bClose 1-4 - Closes -- #bcorresponding number booth -- #bseta-d - Allows you to put text -- #bfor questions over -- #bcorresponding booth -- #bclear - Clears all text above -- #bletters. -- #breset - Resets all current scores -- #bto 3 -- #bset1-4 - Sets text for scores -- #bover corresponding booth -- #bUnlock - Opens beer doors -- #bLock - Closes beer doors -- #b1-5 - Say this to make that many -- #bof the beers poisonous. -- #btimer <secs> - Say this to show -- #bthe timer, which disappears in -- #b10 seconds if you do not specify -- #ban amount -- #bApplause - Say to make -- #baudience applause :)"); -- } else if (strequals(#c,done)) { -- playerdir = 2; -- playerx = 30.5; -- playery = 51; -- } -- }

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (playerchats) { -- if (strequals(#c,MYL Rules)) { -- -- say2 All players start out with -- #bthree points. When asked a -- #bquestion they can either -- #bchoose to answer it or pass -- #bit to another participant. If -- #bthey answer it themselves -- #band get it wrong they -- #bhave to drink a beer. If -- #bthey answer and get it right -- #bthey recieve a point and -- #bkeep control of the -- #bquestions. If they choose -- #bto pass then the one they -- #bpass it to must answer -- #b(can't pass on a passed -- #bquestion). If they answer -- #bwrong all their points goes -- #bto the one that passed -- #bthem the question and -- #bthen they must also -- #bdrink a beer. If they survive -- #bthe beer they gain control -- #bof the next question. If -- #bthey get the question -- #bright then they recieve -- #ba point and gain control of -- #bthe next question. After -- #beach question another beer -- #bbecomes poisionous until -- #bthere are 5 beers poisoned -- #ball together. If a poisoned -- #bbeer is chosen then it warps -- #bthe person who drank it out -- #bof the event. After someone -- #bhas chosen a poisioned -- #bbeer the beers are reset -- #bback to one and it goes so -- #bon and so forth. The game -- #bgoes on until someone -- #breaches 16 points or there -- #bis only one person left. -- #bThere can be different -- #bvariations to the event. So -- #bfollow these rules unless the -- #bGC hosting states otherwise.; -- -- } -- else if (strequals(#c,CoD Rules)) { -- -- say2 There are 3 rounds. Each -- #bteam is asked 2 questions -- #bper round. Each question -- #bin Rounds 1 and 2 are worth -- #b2 points apiece -- #b(a point = 1 ticket) -- #b(In Round 3 correct answers -- #bare worth 1 point). After -- #beach round the team with -- #bthe least amount of points is -- #beliminated (also happens -- #bin Round 3 with final -- #bteam) and each -- #bmember of that team then -- #bmust PM the host Coalition -- #bor Deception. -- #bIf the partner's both pick -- #bCoalition then they split the -- #btickets evenly (in case of an -- #bodd score an extra ticket -- #bis added to compensate). If -- #bone partner goes deception -- #bwhile the other goes coalition, -- #bthen the one that went -- #bdeception gets all the -- #btickets. Though if they both -- #bgo deception, then neither -- #bone of them recieves any -- #btickets.; -- -- } -- }
-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- To watch say 'Watch' -- #bTo stop watching press 's';
-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- For a List of Commands -- #bsay Commands;

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- The control/host area is behind -- #bthe podium. Be sure to be all the -- #bway against it, if not you won't -- #brecieve control.;
